arts.ttl: 'You have to be fair' - Kylian Mbappe sends message to Arsenal player after major announcement made - football.london
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappe has insisted that Arsenal defender William Saliba should share the award for France Football's French Footballer of the Season. Mbappe has already made his feelings clear on Saliba, explaining in the summer: "This season, he has become a very important player for Arsenal and is among the best centre-backs in the Premier League .

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea move for €100m Brazilian wonderkid
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are among the clubs to have enquired about Vitor Reis again in recent days, according to Brazilian media. According to the Brazilian edition of GOAL, Arsenal, Chelsea, Real Madrid and Inter have all made new contact with Palmeiras 'in recent days' to gather information on Reis.

arts.ttl: Arsenal starlet has ‘proven he can compete’ in Premier League
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta says that Myles Lewis-Skelly has “proven he can compete” after being handed his first Premier League start. The 18-year-old defender has broken into the Gunners’ first team this season after coming through the academy, making two top-flight appearances off the bench before this weekend. The youngster has also made three appearances […] The post Arsenal starlet has ‘proven he can compete’ in Premier League first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Fans pay tribute to Arsenal and Everton legend Kevin Campbell ahead of first Premier League clash between the sides since former striker tragically died aged 54
arts.sum: Campbell passed away at the age of 54 in June after falling unwell earlier in the month, leading to an outpouring of emotion from the football community. He was a fan favourite at both Arsenal and Everton.

arts.ttl: Odegaard says Arsenal ‘can do something special’ this season
arts.sum: Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard says the squad “all feel we can do something special this season”. The Gunners are chasing a first Premier League title in over 20 years having finished second in the table behind Manchester City the past two years. They find themselves in third position chasing down leaders Liverpool, who are six […] The post Odegaard says Arsenal ‘can do something special’ this season first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Dwight McNeil surprise absence explained as Everton suffer new injury blow
arts.sum: The midfielder was a surprise absence from the squad for the Premier League clash against Arsenal

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s Kylian Mbappé pips Arsenal star to prestigious individual award
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé has this weekend secured for himself a fresh, and altogether prestigious individual accolade. The prize in question? French Player of the Year for 2023/24. Mbappé’s…

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Everton - Premier League 3pms: Live score, team news and updates as the Gunners host Sean Dyche's Toffees at the Emirates plus updates from the other games including Liverpool vs Fulham
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest team news, updates and live score from the 3pm Premier League meetings including Arsenal vs Everton and Liverpool vs Fulham

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals why Raheem Sterling has struggled for playing time as Arsenal boss insists it is NOT down to 'tactical reasons'
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has insisted that Raheem Sterling's sporadic playing time at Arsenal is not due to tactical reasons.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé gives nod to Arsenal’s William Saliba after winning prestigious award
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé (25) once again won France Football’s French Footballer of the Season award for the 2023/24 campaign, however, he did not run away with it, as he did in the previous…
